languages.text: "Что? Это невообразимо! Должно быть Ферренц нарушил целостность логов. Нунциус, что он с тобой сделал?"
"What? This is inconceivable! Ferrenz must have violated the integrity of the logs. Nuncius, what has he done to you?"
languages.original_text: "Что? Это невообразимо! Должно быть Ферренц нарушил целостность логов. Нунциус, что он с тобой сделал?"

traits.locale_text: "What? This is inconceivable! Ferrenz must have violated the integrity of the logs. Nuncius, what has he done to you?"
"What? This is inconceivable! Ferrenz must have violated the integrity of the logs. Nuncius, what has he done to you?"
"What? This is inconceivable! Ferrenz must have violated the integrity of the logs. Nuncius, what has he done to you?"

languages.text: «¿Qué? ¡Esto es inconcebible! Ferrenz debe de haber alterado la integridad de los registros. Nuncius, ¿qué le ha hecho?».
languages.original_text: "What? This is inconceivable! Ferrenz must have violated the integrity of the logs. Nuncius, what has he done to you?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Qué? ¡Esto es inconcebible! Ferrenz debe de haber alterado la integridad de los registros. Nuncius, ¿qué le ha hecho?».

languages.text: “什么？这绝不可能！费伦茨一定破坏了日志的完整性。努恩修斯，他对你做了什么？”
languages.original_text: "What? This is inconceivable! Ferrenz must have violated the integrity of the logs. Nuncius, what has he done to you?"

traits.locale_text: “什么？这绝不可能！费伦茨一定破坏了日志的完整性。努恩修斯，他对你做了什么？”

languages.text: « Quoi ? C'est inconcevable ! Ferrenz a dû altérer l'intégrité des journaux. Nuncius, que t'a-t-il fait ? »
languages.original_text: "What? This is inconceivable! Ferrenz must have violated the integrity of the logs. Nuncius, what has he done to you?"

traits.locale_text: « Quoi ? C'est inconcevable ! Ferrenz a dû altérer l'intégrité des journaux. Nuncius, que t'a-t-il fait ? »

languages.text: "Ne? Bu akıl almaz bir şey! Ferrenz, kayıtların bütünlüğünü ihlal etmiş olmalı. Nuncius, sana ne yaptı o?"
languages.original_text: "What? This is inconceivable! Ferrenz must have violated the integrity of the logs. Nuncius, what has he done to you?"

traits.locale_text: "Ne? Bu akıl almaz bir şey! Ferrenz, kayıtların bütünlüğünü ihlal etmiş olmalı. Nuncius, sana ne yaptı o?"

languages.text: "Was? "Das ist unfassbar! Ferrenz muss die Integrität der Protokolle verletzt haben. Nuncius, was hat er Euch angetan?"
languages.original_text: "What? This is inconceivable! Ferrenz must have violated the integrity of the logs. Nuncius, what has he done to you?"

traits.locale_text: "Was? "Das ist unfassbar! Ferrenz muss die Integrität der Protokolle verletzt haben. Nuncius, was hat er Euch angetan?"

languages.text: え？これは考えられない！フェレンツはログの整合性を破ったに違いない。ヌンシウス、彼はあなたに何をしたのですか？"
languages.original_text: "What? This is inconceivable! Ferrenz must have violated the integrity of the logs. Nuncius, what has he done to you?"
